title: Chapter 4: The First Lead
content:
The morning air is cold and crisp. You stand at a crossroads in your investigation. Thomas Vane's last hours were spent between two polar opposites of London.||You know the Syndicate is moving fast to clean up his trail. The police are also closing in to seal the crime scenes.||⚠️ DETECTIVE MECHANIC: SINGLE CHOICE
You have time to investigate ONLY ONE of these locations. Once you make your choice, the other lead will be lost forever.||One lead takes you back to the polished marble of the Financial District. The other leads to the rusted, decaying silence of the Industrial Zone.||Where will you start your search?
